entries.name: IMG_DECODER_STATUS_COMPLETE
entries.description: تعاد هذه القيمة عندما لا تبقى إطارات إضافية داخل مفكك الرسوم المتحركة، فتفهم SDL3_image أو التطبيق أن التسلسل انتهى.

entries.name: IMG_DECODER_STATUS_FAILED
entries.description: تعاد هذه القيمة عندما يفشل مفكك الرسوم المتحركة في فك إطار جديد، وعندها يجب فحص SDL_GetError() لمعرفة سبب الفشل.

entries.name: IMG_DECODER_STATUS_OK
entries.description: تعاد هذه القيمة عندما يكون مفكك الرسوم المتحركة جاهزًا لفك الإطار التالي، ويمكن متابعة دورة القراءة المعتادة.

entries.name: MYAPP_CATEGORY_AWESOME1

entries.name: SDL_ADDEVENT

entries.name: SDL_APP_CONTINUE
entries.description: تعاد هذه القيمة من دالة رد نداء في نظام main callbacks للإشارة إلى أن SDL يجب أن تتابع تشغيل التطبيق وأن تستمر في استدعاء دورة التنفيذ التالية.

entries.name: SDL_APP_FAILURE
entries.description: تعاد هذه القيمة من دالة رد نداء في نظام main callbacks للإشارة إلى أن التطبيق أنهى التنفيذ بحالة فشل، فتُنهي SDL حلقة main callbacks وتغلق التطبيق بحالة خطأ.

entries.name: SDL_APP_SUCCESS
entries.description: تعاد هذه القيمة من دالة رد نداء في نظام main callbacks للإشارة إلى أن التطبيق أنهى التنفيذ بنجاح، فتُنهي SDL حلقة main callbacks وتغلق التطبيق بحالة نجاح.

entries.name: SDL_ASSERTION_ALWAYS_IGNORE
entries.description: تشير هذه القيمة إلى أن SDL تتجاهل عبارة التأكيد الحالية في المرات اللاحقة أيضًا ولا تعيد طرحها من جديد.

entries.name: SDL_ASSERTION_BREAK
entries.description: تشير هذه القيمة إلى أن SDL تطلب من المصحح التوقف عند عبارة التأكيد الحالية عبر نقطة توقف.

entries.name: SDL_ASSERTION_IGNORE
entries.description: تشير هذه القيمة إلى أن SDL تتجاهل عبارة التأكيد الحالية مرة واحدة ثم تتابع التنفيذ.

entries.name: SDL_ASSERTION_RETRY
entries.description: تشير هذه القيمة إلى أن SDL تعيد تنفيذ عبارة التأكيد الحالية فورًا بدل متابعة التنفيذ أو إنهاء البرنامج.

entries.name: SDL_ASYNCIO_CANCELED
entries.description: تعاد هذه القيمة عندما يُلغى طلب SDL_AsyncIO قبل اكتماله، وعند ظهورها لا تكون العملية قد وصلت إلى نتيجتها الطبيعية.

entries.name: SDL_ASYNCIO_COMPLETE
entries.description: تعاد هذه القيمة عندما يكتمل طلب SDL_AsyncIO بنجاح، وعند ظهورها يفهم التطبيق أن العملية انتهت من دون خطأ إضافي.

entries.name: SDL_ASYNCIO_FAILURE
entries.description: تعاد هذه القيمة عندما يفشل طلب SDL_AsyncIO، وعند ظهورها يجب فحص SDL_GetError() لمعرفة سبب الفشل قبل متابعة المعالجة.

entries.name: SDL_ASYNCIO_TASK_CLOSE
entries.description: تشير هذه القيمة إلى أن مهمة SDL_AsyncIO الحالية تنفذ إغلاقًا للمورد أو المجرى المرتبط بعد اكتمال العمل عليه.

entries.name: SDL_BLENDFACTOR_ONE_MINUS_DST_ALPHA
entries.description: تشير هذه القيمة إلى أن SDL يستخدم متممة ألفا الوجهة الحالية كعامل مزج لكل القنوات.

entries.name: SDL_BLENDFACTOR_ONE_MINUS_DST_COLOR
entries.description: تشير هذه القيمة إلى أن SDL يستخدم متممة لون الوجهة الحالية كعامل مزج في هذه العملية.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_AUDIO_DRIVER
entries.description: A variable that specifies an audio backend to use.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_AUDIO_DUMMY_TIMESCALE
entries.description: A variable controlling the audio rate when using the dummy audio driver.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_AUDIO_FORMAT
entries.description: A variable controlling the default audio format.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_AUDIO_FREQUENCY
entries.description: A variable controlling the default audio frequency.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_AUDIO_INCLUDE_MONITORS
entries.description: A variable that causes SDL to not ignore audio "monitors".

entries.name: SDL_HINT_AUTO_UPDATE_JOYSTICKS
entries.description: A variable controlling whether SDL updates joystick state when getting input events.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_AUTO_UPDATE_SENSORS
entries.description: A variable controlling whether SDL updates sensor state when getting input events.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_BMP_SAVE_LEGACY_FORMAT
entries.description: Prevent SDL from using version 4 of the bitmap header when saving BMPs.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_CAMERA_DRIVER
entries.description: A variable that decides what camera backend to use.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_CPU_FEATURE_MASK
entries.description: A variable that limits what CPU features are available.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_DISPLAY_USABLE_BOUNDS
entries.description: Override for SDL_GetDisplayUsableBounds ().

entries.name: SDL_HINT_EGL_LIBRARY
entries.description: Specify the EGL library to load.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_EMSCRIPTEN_ASYNCIFY
entries.description: Disable giving back control to the browser automatically when running with asyncify.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_EMSCRIPTEN_CANVAS_SELECTOR
entries.description: Specify the CSS selector used for the "default" window/canvas.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_EMSCRIPTEN_KEYBOARD_ELEMENT
entries.description: Override the binding element for keyboard inputs for Emscripten builds.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_ENABLE_SCREEN_KEYBOARD
entries.description: A variable that controls whether the on-screen keyboard should be shown when text input is active.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_EVDEV_DEVICES
entries.description: A variable containing a list of evdev devices to use if udev is not available.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_EVENT_LOGGING
entries.description: A variable controlling verbosity of the logging of SDL events pushed onto the internal queue.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_FILE_DIALOG_DRIVER
entries.description: A variable that specifies a dialog backend to use.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_FORCE_RAISEWINDOW
entries.description: A variable controlling whether raising the window should be done more forcefully.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_FRAMEBUFFER_ACCELERATION
entries.description: A variable controlling how 3D acceleration is used to accelerate the SDL screen surface.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_GAMECONTROLLER_IGNORE_DEVICES
entries.description: A variable containing a list of devices to skip when scanning for game controllers.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_GAMECONTROLLER_IGNORE_DEVICES_EXCEPT
entries.description: If set, all devices will be skipped when scanning for game controllers except for the ones listed in this variable.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_GAMECONTROLLER_SENSOR_FUSION
entries.description: A variable that controls whether the device's built-in accelerometer and gyro should be used as sensors for gamepads.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_GAMECONTROLLERCONFIG
entries.description: A variable that lets you manually hint extra gamecontroller db entries.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_GAMECONTROLLERCONFIG_FILE
entries.description: A variable that lets you provide a file with extra gamecontroller db entries.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_GAMECONTROLLERTYPE
entries.description: A variable that overrides the automatic controller type detection.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_GDK_TEXTINPUT_DEFAULT_TEXT
entries.description: This variable sets the default text of the TextInput window on GDK platforms.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_GDK_TEXTINPUT_DESCRIPTION
entries.description: This variable sets the description of the TextInput window on GDK platforms.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_GDK_TEXTINPUT_MAX_LENGTH
entries.description: This variable sets the maximum input length of the TextInput window on GDK platforms.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_GDK_TEXTINPUT_SCOPE
entries.description: This variable sets the input scope of the TextInput window on GDK platforms.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_GDK_TEXTINPUT_TITLE
entries.description: This variable sets the title of the TextInput window on GDK platforms.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_GPU_DRIVER
entries.description: A variable that specifies a GPU backend to use.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_HIDAPI_ENUMERATE_ONLY_CONTROLLERS
entries.description: A variable to control whether SDL_hid_enumerate () enumerates all HID devices or only controllers.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_HIDAPI_IGNORE_DEVICES
entries.description: A variable containing a list of devices to ignore in SDL_hid_enumerate ().

entries.name: SDL_HINT_HIDAPI_LIBUSB
entries.description: A variable to control whether HIDAPI uses libusb for device access.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_HIDAPI_LIBUSB_GAMECUBE
entries.description: A variable to control whether HIDAPI uses libusb for GameCube adapters.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_HIDAPI_LIBUSB_WHITELIST
entries.description: A variable to control whether HIDAPI uses libusb only for whitelisted devices.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_HIDAPI_UDEV
entries.description: A variable to control whether HIDAPI uses udev for device detection.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_IME_IMPLEMENTED_UI
entries.description: A variable describing what IME UI elements the application can display.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_INVALID_PARAM_CHECKS
entries.description: Set the level of checking for invalid parameters passed to SDL functions.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_IOS_HIDE_HOME_INDICATOR
entries.description: A variable controlling whether the home indicator bar on iPhone X and later should be hidden.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_JOYSTICK_ALLOW_BACKGROUND_EVENTS
entries.description: A variable that lets you enable joystick (and gamecontroller) events even when your app is in the background.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_JOYSTICK_ARCADESTICK_DEVICES
entries.description: A variable containing a list of arcade stick style controllers.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_JOYSTICK_ARCADESTICK_DEVICES_EXCLUDED
entries.description: A variable containing a list of devices that are not arcade stick style controllers.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_JOYSTICK_BLACKLIST_DEVICES
entries.description: A variable containing a list of devices that should not be considered joysticks.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_JOYSTICK_BLACKLIST_DEVICES_EXCLUDED
entries.description: A variable containing a list of devices that should be considered joysticks.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_JOYSTICK_DEVICE
entries.description: A variable containing a comma separated list of devices to open as joysticks.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_JOYSTICK_DIRECTINPUT
entries.description: A variable controlling whether DirectInput should be used for controllers.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_JOYSTICK_ENHANCED_REPORTS
entries.description: A variable controlling whether enhanced reports should be used for controllers when using the HIDAPI driver.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_JOYSTICK_FLIGHTSTICK_DEVICES
entries.description: A variable containing a list of flightstick style controllers.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_JOYSTICK_FLIGHTSTICK_DEVICES_EXCLUDED
entries.description: A variable containing a list of devices that are not flightstick style controllers.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_JOYSTICK_GAMECUBE_DEVICES
entries.description: A variable containing a list of devices known to have a GameCube form factor.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_JOYSTICK_GAMECUBE_DEVICES_EXCLUDED
entries.description: A variable containing a list of devices known not to have a GameCube form factor.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_JOYSTICK_GAMEINPUT
entries.description: A variable controlling whether GameInput should be used for controller handling on Windows.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_JOYSTICK_HAPTIC_AXES
entries.description: A variable containing a list of devices and their desired number of haptic (force feedback) enabled axis.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_JOYSTICK_HIDAPI
entries.description: A variable controlling whether the HIDAPI joystick drivers should be used.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_JOYSTICK_HIDAPI_8BITDO
entries.description: A variable controlling whether the HIDAPI driver for 8BitDo controllers should be used.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_JOYSTICK_HIDAPI_COMBINE_JOY_CONS
entries.description: A variable controlling whether Nintendo Switch Joy-Con controllers will be combined into a single Pro-like controller when using the HIDAPI driver.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_JOYSTICK_HIDAPI_FLYDIGI
entries.description: A variable controlling whether the HIDAPI driver for Flydigi controllers should be used.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_JOYSTICK_HIDAPI_GAMECUBE
entries.description: A variable controlling whether the HIDAPI driver for Nintendo GameCube controllers should be used.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_JOYSTICK_HIDAPI_GAMECUBE_RUMBLE_BRAKE
entries.description: A variable controlling whether rumble is used to implement the GameCube controller's 3 rumble modes, Stop(0), Rumble(1), and StopHard(2).

entries.name: SDL_HINT_JOYSTICK_HIDAPI_GAMESIR
entries.description: A variable controlling whether the HIDAPI driver for GameSir controllers should be used.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_JOYSTICK_HIDAPI_GIP
entries.description: A variable controlling whether the new HIDAPI driver for wired Xbox One (GIP) controllers should be used.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_JOYSTICK_HIDAPI_GIP_RESET_FOR_METADATA
entries.description: A variable controlling whether the new HIDAPI driver for wired Xbox One (GIP) controllers should reset the controller if it can't get the metadata from the controller.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_JOYSTICK_HIDAPI_JOY_CONS
entries.description: A variable controlling whether the HIDAPI driver for Nintendo Switch Joy-Cons should be used.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_JOYSTICK_HIDAPI_JOYCON_HOME_LED
entries.description: A variable controlling whether the Home button LED should be turned on when a Nintendo Switch Joy-Con controller is opened.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_JOYSTICK_HIDAPI_LG4FF
entries.description: A variable controlling whether the HIDAPI driver for some Logitech wheels should be used.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_JOYSTICK_HIDAPI_LUNA
entries.description: A variable controlling whether the HIDAPI driver for Amazon Luna controllers connected via Bluetooth should be used.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_JOYSTICK_HIDAPI_NINTENDO_CLASSIC
entries.description: A variable controlling whether the HIDAPI driver for Nintendo Online classic controllers should be used.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_JOYSTICK_HIDAPI_PS3
entries.description: A variable controlling whether the HIDAPI driver for PS3 controllers should be used.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_JOYSTICK_HIDAPI_PS3_SIXAXIS_DRIVER
entries.description: A variable controlling whether the Sony driver (sixaxis.sys) for PS3 controllers (Sixaxis/DualShock 3) should be used.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_JOYSTICK_HIDAPI_PS4
entries.description: A variable controlling whether the HIDAPI driver for PS4 controllers should be used.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_JOYSTICK_HIDAPI_PS4_REPORT_INTERVAL
entries.description: A variable controlling the update rate of the PS4 controller over Bluetooth when using the HIDAPI driver.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_JOYSTICK_HIDAPI_PS5
entries.description: A variable controlling whether the HIDAPI driver for PS5 controllers should be used.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_JOYSTICK_HIDAPI_PS5_PLAYER_LED
entries.description: A variable controlling whether the player LEDs should be lit to indicate which player is associated with a PS5 controller.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_JOYSTICK_HIDAPI_SHIELD
entries.description: A variable controlling whether the HIDAPI driver for NVIDIA SHIELD controllers should be used.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_JOYSTICK_HIDAPI_SINPUT
entries.description: A variable controlling whether the HIDAPI driver for SInput controllers should be used.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_JOYSTICK_HIDAPI_STADIA
entries.description: A variable controlling whether the HIDAPI driver for Google Stadia controllers should be used.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_JOYSTICK_HIDAPI_STEAM
entries.description: A variable controlling whether the HIDAPI driver for Bluetooth Steam Controllers should be used.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_JOYSTICK_HIDAPI_STEAM_HOME_LED
entries.description: A variable controlling whether the Steam button LED should be turned on when a Steam controller is opened.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_JOYSTICK_HIDAPI_STEAM_HORI
entries.description: A variable controlling whether the HIDAPI driver for HORI licensed Steam controllers should be used.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_JOYSTICK_HIDAPI_STEAMDECK
entries.description: A variable controlling whether the HIDAPI driver for the Steam Deck builtin controller should be used.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_JOYSTICK_HIDAPI_SWITCH
entries.description: A variable controlling whether the HIDAPI driver for Nintendo Switch controllers should be used.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_JOYSTICK_HIDAPI_SWITCH_HOME_LED
entries.description: A variable controlling whether the Home button LED should be turned on when a Nintendo Switch Pro controller is opened.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_JOYSTICK_HIDAPI_SWITCH_PLAYER_LED
entries.description: A variable controlling whether the player LEDs should be lit to indicate which player is associated with a Nintendo Switch controller.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_JOYSTICK_HIDAPI_SWITCH2
entries.description: A variable controlling whether the HIDAPI driver for Nintendo Switch 2 controllers should be used.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_JOYSTICK_HIDAPI_VERTICAL_JOY_CONS
entries.description: A variable controlling whether Nintendo Switch Joy-Con controllers will be in vertical mode when using the HIDAPI driver.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_JOYSTICK_HIDAPI_WII
entries.description: A variable controlling whether the HIDAPI driver for Nintendo Wii and Wii U controllers should be used.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_JOYSTICK_HIDAPI_WII_PLAYER_LED
entries.description: A variable controlling whether the player LEDs should be lit to indicate which player is associated with a Wii controller.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_JOYSTICK_HIDAPI_XBOX
entries.description: A variable controlling whether the HIDAPI driver for XBox controllers should be used.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_JOYSTICK_HIDAPI_XBOX_360
entries.description: A variable controlling whether the HIDAPI driver for XBox 360 controllers should be used.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_JOYSTICK_HIDAPI_XBOX_360_PLAYER_LED
entries.description: A variable controlling whether the player LEDs should be lit to indicate which player is associated with an Xbox 360 controller.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_JOYSTICK_HIDAPI_XBOX_360_WIRELESS
entries.description: A variable controlling whether the HIDAPI driver for XBox 360 wireless controllers should be used.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_JOYSTICK_HIDAPI_XBOX_ONE
entries.description: A variable controlling whether the HIDAPI driver for XBox One controllers should be used.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_JOYSTICK_HIDAPI_XBOX_ONE_HOME_LED
entries.description: A variable controlling whether the Home button LED should be turned on when an Xbox One controller is opened.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_JOYSTICK_HIDAPI_ZUIKI
entries.description: A variable controlling whether the HIDAPI driver for ZUIKI controllers should be used.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_JOYSTICK_IOKIT
entries.description: A variable controlling whether IOKit should be used for controller handling.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_JOYSTICK_LINUX_CLASSIC
entries.description: A variable controlling whether to use the classic /dev/input/js* joystick interface or the newer /dev/input/event* joystick interface on Linux.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_JOYSTICK_LINUX_DEADZONES
entries.description: A variable controlling whether joysticks on Linux adhere to their HID-defined deadzones or return unfiltered values.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_JOYSTICK_LINUX_DIGITAL_HATS
entries.description: A variable controlling whether joysticks on Linux will always treat 'hat' axis inputs (ABS_HAT0X - ABS_HAT3Y) as 8-way digital hats without checking whether they may be analog.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_JOYSTICK_LINUX_HAT_DEADZONES
entries.description: A variable controlling whether digital hats on Linux will apply deadzones to their underlying input axes or use unfiltered values.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_JOYSTICK_MFI
entries.description: A variable controlling whether GCController should be used for controller handling.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_JOYSTICK_RAWINPUT
entries.description: A variable controlling whether the RAWINPUT joystick drivers should be used for better handling XInput-capable devices.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_JOYSTICK_RAWINPUT_CORRELATE_XINPUT
entries.description: A variable controlling whether the RAWINPUT driver should pull correlated data from XInput.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_JOYSTICK_ROG_CHAKRAM
entries.description: A variable controlling whether the ROG Chakram mice should show up as joysticks.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_JOYSTICK_THREAD
entries.description: A variable controlling whether a separate thread should be used for handling joystick detection and raw input messages on Windows.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_JOYSTICK_THROTTLE_DEVICES
entries.description: A variable containing a list of throttle style controllers.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_JOYSTICK_THROTTLE_DEVICES_EXCLUDED
entries.description: A variable containing a list of devices that are not throttle style controllers.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_JOYSTICK_WGI
entries.description: A variable controlling whether Windows.Gaming.Input should be used for controller handling.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_JOYSTICK_WHEEL_DEVICES
entries.description: A variable containing a list of wheel style controllers.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_JOYSTICK_WHEEL_DEVICES_EXCLUDED
entries.description: A variable containing a list of devices that are not wheel style controllers.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_JOYSTICK_ZERO_CENTERED_DEVICES
entries.description: A variable containing a list of devices known to have all axes centered at zero.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_KEYCODE_OPTIONS
entries.description: A variable that controls keycode representation in keyboard events.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_KMSDRM_ATOMIC
entries.description: A variable that controls whether KMSDRM will use "atomic" functionality.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_KMSDRM_DEVICE_INDEX
entries.description: A variable that controls what KMSDRM device to use.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_KMSDRM_REQUIRE_DRM_MASTER
entries.description: A variable that controls whether SDL requires DRM master access in order to initialize the KMSDRM video backend.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_LOGGING
entries.description: A variable controlling the default SDL log levels.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_MAC_BACKGROUND_APP
entries.description: A variable controlling whether to force the application to become the foreground process when launched on macOS.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_MAC_CTRL_CLICK_EMULATE_RIGHT_CLICK
entries.description: A variable that determines whether Ctrl+Click should generate a right-click event on macOS.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_MAC_OPENGL_ASYNC_DISPATCH
entries.description: A variable controlling whether dispatching OpenGL context updates should block the dispatching thread until the main thread finishes processing on macOS.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_MAC_OPTION_AS_ALT
entries.description: A variable controlling whether the Option key on macOS should be remapped to act as the Alt key.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_MAC_PRESS_AND_HOLD
entries.description: A variable controlling whether holding down a key will repeat the pressed key or open the accents menu on macOS.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_MAC_SCROLL_MOMENTUM
entries.description: A variable controlling whether SDL_EVENT_MOUSE_WHEEL event values will have momentum on macOS.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_MAIN_CALLBACK_RATE
entries.description: Request SDL_AppIterate () be called at a specific rate.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_MOUSE_AUTO_CAPTURE
entries.description: A variable controlling whether the mouse is captured while mouse buttons are pressed.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_MOUSE_DEFAULT_SYSTEM_CURSOR
entries.description: A variable setting which system cursor to use as the default cursor.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_MOUSE_DOUBLE_CLICK_RADIUS
entries.description: A variable setting the double click radius, in pixels.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_MOUSE_DOUBLE_CLICK_TIME
entries.description: A variable setting the double click time, in milliseconds.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_MOUSE_DPI_SCALE_CURSORS
entries.description: A variable setting whether we should scale cursors by the current display scale.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_MOUSE_EMULATE_WARP_WITH_RELATIVE
entries.description: A variable controlling whether warping a hidden mouse cursor will activate relative mouse mode.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_MOUSE_FOCUS_CLICKTHROUGH
entries.description: Allow mouse click events when clicking to focus an SDL window.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_MOUSE_NORMAL_SPEED_SCALE
entries.description: A variable setting the speed scale for mouse motion, in floating point, when the mouse is not in relative mode.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_MOUSE_RELATIVE_CURSOR_VISIBLE
entries.description: A variable controlling whether the hardware cursor stays visible when relative mode is active.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_MOUSE_RELATIVE_MODE_CENTER
entries.description: A variable controlling whether relative mouse mode constrains the mouse to the center of the window.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_MOUSE_RELATIVE_SPEED_SCALE
entries.description: A variable setting the scale for mouse motion, in floating point, when the mouse is in relative mode.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_MOUSE_RELATIVE_SYSTEM_SCALE
entries.description: A variable controlling whether the system mouse acceleration curve is used for relative mouse motion.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_MOUSE_RELATIVE_WARP_MOTION
entries.description: A variable controlling whether a motion event should be generated for mouse warping in relative mode.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_MOUSE_TOUCH_EVENTS
entries.description: A variable controlling whether mouse events should generate synthetic touch events.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_MUTE_CONSOLE_KEYBOARD
entries.description: A variable controlling whether the keyboard should be muted on the console.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_NO_SIGNAL_HANDLERS
entries.description: Tell SDL not to catch the SIGINT or SIGTERM signals on POSIX platforms.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_OPENGL_ES_DRIVER
entries.description: A variable controlling what driver to use for OpenGL ES contexts.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_OPENGL_FORCE_SRGB_CAPABLE
entries.description: A variable controlling whether to force an sRGB-capable OpenGL context.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_OPENGL_FORCE_SRGB_FRAMEBUFFER
entries.description: A variable controlling whether to force an sRGB-capable OpenGL context.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_OPENGL_LIBRARY
entries.description: Specify the OpenGL library to load.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_OPENVR_LIBRARY
entries.description: Mechanism to specify openvr_api library location

entries.name: SDL_HINT_OPENXR_LIBRARY
entries.description: A variable that specifies the library name to use when loading the OpenXR loader.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_ORIENTATIONS
entries.description: A variable controlling which orientations are allowed on iOS/Android.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_PEN_MOUSE_EVENTS
entries.description: A variable controlling whether pen events should generate synthetic mouse events.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_PEN_TOUCH_EVENTS
entries.description: A variable controlling whether pen events should generate synthetic touch events.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_POLL_SENTINEL
entries.description: A variable controlling the use of a sentinel event when polling the event queue.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_PREFERRED_LOCALES
entries.description: Override for SDL_GetPreferredLocales ().

entries.name: SDL_HINT_PS2_GS_HEIGHT
entries.description: A variable controlling the height of the PS2's framebuffer in pixels.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_PS2_GS_MODE
entries.description: A variable controlling the video mode of the console.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_PS2_GS_PROGRESSIVE
entries.description: A variable controlling whether the signal is interlaced or progressive.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_PS2_GS_WIDTH
entries.description: A variable controlling the width of the PS2's framebuffer in pixels.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_QUIT_ON_LAST_WINDOW_CLOSE
entries.description: A variable that decides whether to send SDL_EVENT_QUIT when closing the last window.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_RENDER_DIRECT3D_THREADSAFE
entries.description: A variable controlling whether the Direct3D device is initialized for thread-safe operations.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_RENDER_DIRECT3D11_DEBUG
entries.description: A variable controlling whether to enable Direct3D 11+'s Debug Layer.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_RENDER_DIRECT3D11_WARP
entries.description: A variable controlling whether to use the Direct3D 11 WARP software rasterizer.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_RENDER_DRIVER
entries.description: A variable specifying which render driver to use.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_RENDER_GPU_DEBUG
entries.description: A variable controlling whether to create the GPU device in debug mode.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_RENDER_GPU_LOW_POWER
entries.description: A variable controlling whether to prefer a low-power GPU on multi-GPU systems.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_RENDER_LINE_METHOD
entries.description: A variable controlling how the 2D render API renders lines.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_RENDER_METAL_PREFER_LOW_POWER_DEVICE
entries.description: A variable controlling whether the Metal render driver select low power device over default one.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_RENDER_VSYNC
entries.description: A variable controlling whether updates to the SDL screen surface should be synchronized with the vertical refresh, to avoid tearing.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_RENDER_VULKAN_DEBUG
entries.description: A variable controlling whether to enable Vulkan Validation Layers.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_RETURN_KEY_HIDES_IME
entries.description: A variable to control whether the return key on the soft keyboard should hide the soft keyboard on Android and iOS.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_ROG_GAMEPAD_MICE
entries.description: A variable containing a list of ROG gamepad capable mice.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_ROG_GAMEPAD_MICE_EXCLUDED
entries.description: A variable containing a list of devices that are not ROG gamepad capable mice.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_RPI_VIDEO_LAYER
entries.description: A variable controlling which Dispmanx layer to use on a Raspberry PI.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_SCREENSAVER_INHIBIT_ACTIVITY_NAME
entries.description: Specify an "activity name" for screensaver inhibition.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_SHUTDOWN_DBUS_ON_QUIT
entries.description: A variable controlling whether SDL calls dbus_shutdown() on quit.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_STORAGE_TITLE_DRIVER
entries.description: A variable that specifies a backend to use for title storage.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_STORAGE_USER_DRIVER
entries.description: A variable that specifies a backend to use for user storage.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_THREAD_FORCE_REALTIME_TIME_CRITICAL
entries.description: Specifies whether SDL_THREAD_PRIORITY_TIME_CRITICAL should be treated as realtime.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_THREAD_PRIORITY_POLICY
entries.description: A string specifying additional information to use with SDL_SetCurrentThreadPriority .

entries.name: SDL_HINT_TIMER_RESOLUTION
entries.description: A variable that controls the timer resolution, in milliseconds.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_TOUCH_MOUSE_EVENTS
entries.description: A variable controlling whether touch events should generate synthetic mouse events.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_TRACKPAD_IS_TOUCH_ONLY
entries.description: A variable controlling whether trackpads should be treated as touch devices.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_TV_REMOTE_AS_JOYSTICK
entries.description: A variable controlling whether the Android / tvOS remotes should be listed as joystick devices, instead of sending keyboard events.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_VIDEO_ALLOW_SCREENSAVER
entries.description: A variable controlling whether the screensaver is enabled.

entries.name: SDL_HINT_VIDEO_DISPLAY_PRIORITY

entries.name: SDL_HINT_VIDEO_MINIMIZE_ON_FOCUS_LOSS

entries.name: SDL_HINT_VIDEO_WAYLAND_PREFER_LIBDECOR

entries.description: Used to indicate that the window position should be centered.

entries.name: SDL_WINDOWPOS_CENTERED_MASK
entries.description: A magic value used with SDL_WINDOWPOS_CENTERED .

entries.name: SDL_WINDOWPOS_ISCENTERED
entries.description: A macro to test if the window position is marked as "centered."

entries.name: SDL_WINDOWPOS_ISUNDEFINED
entries.description: A macro to test if the window position is marked as "undefined."

entries.name: SDL_WINDOWPOS_UNDEFINED
